title: galium pusillum subsp. hypnoides
intro: Galium pusillum subsp. hypnoides, also known as small bedstraw or lesser bedstraw, is a subspecies of plant belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium spp.). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Galium pusillum subsp. hypnoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
